   - 'Coastal Yoga Retreat Day' (€40) - This corresponds to 'Yoga Retreat' (€40) with a rating of 10.
   - 'Guided Photography Walk in Alfama & Belem' (€25) - This appears to be a photography-focused city tour, which could map to either 'City Walking Tour' (€20, rating 9) or 'Street Art Tour' (€25, rating 9). Given the €25 price point and photography focus, 'Street Art Tour' is the better match with a rating of 9.

5. **Additional Services**: The package mentions 'Enhanced Safety Coordination Service' as included. This service is not explicitly listed in the ground-truth ratings, so I cannot map it to a rating.

Since the additional service cannot be mapped, I will only include the items that have corresponding ratings in the ground-truth data.
